message:
style(indexer/responsiveness): replace .min().max() chain with clamp()

`capacity_pct.min(100).max(1)` is exactly `capacity_pct.clamp(1, 100)`
but spelled awkwardly enough that `clippy::manual_clamp` fires. Switch
to the canonical `clamp` form — same bounds, same behaviour, one less
pedantic clippy warning on the new file landed in 3f947725.
